title: Cuneiform Tablet #0031: Middle Assyrian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
